title: 2.7 Million Tasks Completed by 1,000+ Accounts Using CarbonTO-DO!

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
📣 Celebrating Milestones with the CarbonTO-DO Suite 📣

We've got some awesome usage stats to report back to you!🚀

We’re thrilled to share that the CarbonTO-DO Suite has soared past 1,000 installs on the app marketplace! Collectively, CarbonTO-DO users have completed more than 2.7 million tasks since launching on December 6th!

That’s an average of 2,683 tasks completed per account.
Approximately 14,673 tasks completed daily.
And an impressive 37 trees saved by replacing sticky notes!

Experience the power of automation with CarbonTO-DO today. Best part? It’s completely free!

Add CarbonTO-DO to your workspace now and join the movement!
